title: aureolaria pedicularia var. carolinensis
intro: Aureolaria pedicularia var. carolinensis, also known as the Carolina Red Rod, is a flowering plant species native to eastern North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Aureolaria pedicularia var. carolinensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs, and soothe respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant may be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
